scripts.build: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm -r --if-present run build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm run typecheck:libs && pnpm -r --filter "./artifacts/**" --filter "./scripts" --if-present run typecheck
scripts.check:website-deploy: pnpm run check:merge-conflicts && pnpm run typecheck:libs && pnpm --filter @workspace/scripts run check:indexing-guards && pnpm --filter @workspace/website build
